recommendations.title: The Abominable Snowman
recommendations.overview: A kindly English botanist and a gruff American promoter lead an expedition to the Himalayas in search of the legendary Yeti.

recommendations.title: The Day the Earth Caught Fire

recommendations.title: Casino Royale
recommendations.overview: Sir James Bond is called back out of retirement to stop SMERSH. In order to trick SMERSH, James thinks up the ultimate plan - that every agent will be named 'James Bond'. One of the Bonds, whose real name is Evelyn Tremble is sent to take on Le Chiff
recommendations.director: Val Guest, Robert Parrish, Joseph McGrath, Ken Hughes, John Huston

recommendations.title: Sputnik

recommendations.title: Some Guy Who Kills People
recommendations.overview: A former mental patient's repressed anger reaches the boiling point, leading him to embark on a mission of revenge against the thugs who once subjected him to severe physical and mental trauma.

recommendations.title: Frances
recommendations.overview: The true story of Frances Farmer's meteoric rise to fame in Hollywood and the tragic turn her life took when she was blacklisted.

recommendations.title: Night of the Creeps

recommendations.title: Wrong Turn
recommendations.overview: Chris crashes into a carload of other young people, and the group of stranded motorists is soon lost in the woods of West Virginia, where they're hunted by three cannibalistic mountain men who are grossly disfigured by generations of inbreeding.
